case_title: DON T. CAREY VS. BRIANA AKEMANN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY CAREY, DON T. AS TO DEFENDANT AKEMANN, BRIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAREY, DON T. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED FEB-09-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AKEMANN, BRIANA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-06-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO REFLECT AN INCREASED CLAIM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-20-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS UNTIMELY UNTIL 6/15/16. DEFENDANT AGREED TO THE CHANGE OF HEARING DATE TO 6/20/16. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-12-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DON T. CAREY AND DEFENDANT BRIANA AKEMANN. SUE MORIGUCHI, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAREY, DON T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AKEMANN, BRIANA $7,885.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,885.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
